_doc: THE TANK REGISTRY (CYBORG_BRAIN.md §5) — seven accounts, seven parallel regions, each pinned to a DIFFERENT model so the marquee senses stop being mutually exclusive. key_index maps into the same ~/.gemini/.env numbered-key pool the Dugout loads (0-based). quota_est is a conservative daily unit estimate; the fuelboard self-tunes observed ceilings on 429s with the starvation guard (never below the estimate). T3 Cochlea ships DISABLED: a preview affective surface whose only legal output is a mouth-timing hint (the affect firewall is live in thalamus.mjs); flip enabled when the captain wants the empirical probe. T4 Bridge has no Gemini key — its budget is the brain ledger (Opus window).
